description: A customer calls to cancel an order they placed earlier in the day.

nodes.task_description: Identify the order the customer wishes to cancel.
Check the order's status to ensure it has not yet been shipped.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the order has not shipped.

nodes.task_description: Cancel the order in the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully cancels the sales order.

nodes.task_description: Send a cancellation confirmation to the customer.

expected_outcome.value: The customer receives an email confirming the cancellation.
